title: Commercial Manager - Project
description:
About the Role

McConnell Dowell seeks an experienced Commercial Manager for our marine work projects in Singapore. In this leadership role, you will drive commercial success, ensure seamless contract administration, and play a key role in shaping our high-impact infrastructure projects.

If you're a strategic thinker, a problem solver, and a leader who thrives in dynamic environments, we want to hear from you!

What You’ll Do

  • Lead & Strategize: Supporting the Project Manager to oversee commercial and contractual activities in the project on-site, ensuring efficiency, compliance, and risk mitigation.
  • Optimize Performance: Implement commercial policies, manage financial forecasting, and drive cost control.
  • Risk & Opportunity Management: Identify potential risks, develop mitigation strategies, and maximize opportunities.
  • Contract Expertise: Administer and manage head contracts, ensuring smooth execution and resolution of contractual matters.
  • Financial Oversight: Manage cash flow forecasts, monthly reporting, and final account closure.
  • Stakeholder Engagement: Collaborate with clients, contractors, consultants, and internal teams to achieve optimal project outcomes.
  • Dispute Resolution: Provide strategic guidance on contractual issues and assist in negotiations for favorable outcomes.
  • Leadership & Mentorship: Train and develop contract administration and project teams in commercial best practices.
  • Compliance & Audits: Ensure adherence to legal standards and participate in external audits as required.

The ideal candidate

  • A tertiary qualification in Engineering, Construction, Quantity Surveying, or related fields.
  • 10 years in contractual/project engineering and commercial management in similar large scale projects.
  • Proven ability to analyze contractual/legal issues and drive innovative solutions.
  • Strong financial and risk management skills with a keen eye for cost control.
  • Excellent communication and stakeholder management abilities.
  • Ready to start at short notice and work an alternate 6-day work week.

Why Join McConnell Dowell?

Make an Impact: Shape major infrastructure projects that enhance communities.

Career Growth: Work alongside industry experts and develop your leadership skills.

Supportive Culture: A diverse and inclusive workplace where innovation thrives.

Global Network: Be part of an organization with 60+ years of expertise across Australia, New Zealand, the Pacific Islands, and Southeast Asia.

Ready to Build the Future? Apply Now!

We'd love to hear from you if you're passionate about driving commercial excellence and making a meaningful impact. Join McConnell Dowell and be part of a team that builds a better future one project at a time.

Note: McConnell Dowell is sourcing this role directly, and we do not accept applications from external recruitment agencies.

postedCompany.description:
McCONNELL DOWELL SOUTH EAST ASIA PRIVATE LIMITED

Founded in 1961, McConnell Dowell is a world class engineering, construction, building and maintenance company, which operates throughout Australia, New Zealand and the Pacific, South East Asia and the Middle East.  Our business comprises of Pipeline, Tunnel & Underground, Civil & Marine, HSEQ and Rail divisions.  Our reputation has been built on undertaking challenging and complex projects  we pride ourselves on our engineering excellence.

We have an excellent opportunity for a high performing individual to join our team based in Singapore office.
